---
title: "HW2"
author: "Mengyan Jing and Abhishek Banerjee"
date: "2026-02-23"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Problem 1


```{r}
integrand <- function(t, s) {
  # Use log-scale computation to avoid overflow/underflow
  exp((s - 1) * log(t) - t)
}

lower_inc_gamma <- function(s, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return(0)
  
  # For large x, compute as gamma(s) - upper
  if (x > 700) {
    return(gamma(s) - upper_inc_gamma(s, x))
  }
  
  # Split: integrate from a small epsilon to x
  # Near 0, use substitution u = t^s to remove singularity
  # Original: integral of t^(s-1)*exp(-t) dt from 0 to x
  # Sub u = t^s => t = u^(1/s), dt = (1/s)*u^(1/s - 1) du
  # Integral becomes (1/s) * integral of exp(-u^(1/s)) du from 0 to x^s
  
  if (s < 1) {
    # Use substitution
    transformed_integrand <- function(u, s) {
      (1/s) * exp(-u^(1/s))
    }
    result <- integrate(transformed_integrand, lower = 0, upper = x^s, s = s,
                        rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  } else {
    result <- integrate(integrand, lower = 0, upper = x, s = s,
                        rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  }
  return(result$value)
}

upper_inc_gamma <- function(s, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return(gamma(s))
  result <- integrate(integrand, lower = x, upper = Inf, s = s,
                      rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  return(result$value)
}

lower_inc_gamma_vec <- function(s_vec, x_vec) {
  mapply(lower_inc_gamma, s_vec, x_vec)
}

upper_inc_gamma_vec <- function(s_vec, x_vec) {
  mapply(upper_inc_gamma, s_vec, x_vec)
}
```

```{r}
s_vals <- seq(0.0001, 10, length.out = 100)
x_vals <- seq(0.0001, 10000, length.out = 100)
param_set <- expand.grid(s = s_vals, x = x_vals)

# Time lower
ptm <- proc.time()
lower_results <- lower_inc_gamma_vec(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

# Time upper
ptm <- proc.time()
upper_results <- upper_inc_gamma_vec(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

```


```{r}
# Baseline from R's built-in functions
baseline_lower <- pgamma(param_set$x, shape = param_set$s, scale = 1, 
                          lower.tail = TRUE) * gamma(param_set$s)
baseline_upper <- pgamma(param_set$x, shape = param_set$s, scale = 1, 
                          lower.tail = FALSE) * gamma(param_set$s)

# MSE
mse_lower <- mean((lower_results - baseline_lower)^2)
mse_upper <- mean((upper_results - baseline_upper)^2)

cat("MSE lower:", mse_lower, "\n")
cat("MSE upper:", mse_upper, "\n")

```


```{r}
library(Rcpp)
```

```{r}
Sys.which("make")
```

## Task 1

```{Rcpp}
#include <Rcpp.h>
#include <cmath>
using namespace Rcpp;

// [[Rcpp::export]]
NumericVector integrand_cpp(NumericVector t, double s) {
  int n = t.size();
  NumericVector out(n);
  for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
    out[i] = std::exp((s - 1.0) * std::log(t[i]) - t[i]);
  }
  return out;
}

// [[Rcpp::export]]
NumericVector transformed_integrand_cpp(NumericVector u, double s) {
  int n = u.size();
  NumericVector out(n);
  for(int i=0; i<n; i++){
    out[i] = (1.0 / s) * std::exp(-std::pow(u[i], 1.0 / s));
  }
  return out;
}
```



```{r}
lower_inc_gamma_cpp <- function(s, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return(0)
  
  if (x > 700) {
    return(gamma(s) - upper_inc_gamma_cpp(s, x))
  }
  
  if (s < 1) {
    result <- integrate(function(u) transformed_integrand_cpp(u, s),
                        lower = 0, upper = x^s,
                        rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  } else {
    result <- integrate(function(t) integrand_cpp(t, s),
                        lower = 0, upper = x,
                        rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  }
  return(result$value)
}

upper_inc_gamma_cpp <- function(s, x) {
  if (x <= 0) return(gamma(s))
  result <- integrate(function(t) integrand_cpp(t, s),
                      lower = x, upper = Inf,
                      rel.tol = 1e-10, subdivisions = 1000L)
  return(result$value)
}

lower_inc_gamma_cpp_vec <- function(s_vec, x_vec) {
  mapply(lower_inc_gamma_cpp, s_vec, x_vec)
}

upper_inc_gamma_cpp_vec <- function(s_vec, x_vec) {
  mapply(upper_inc_gamma_cpp, s_vec, x_vec)
}
```


```{r}
# Timing
ptm <- proc.time()
lower_results_cpp <- lower_inc_gamma_cpp_vec(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

ptm <- proc.time()
upper_results_cpp <- upper_inc_gamma_cpp_vec(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

# MSE
mse_lower_cpp <- mean((lower_results_cpp - baseline_lower)^2)
mse_upper_cpp <- mean((upper_results_cpp - baseline_upper)^2)
cat("MSE lower (C++ integrand):", mse_lower_cpp, "\n")
cat("MSE upper (C++ integrand):", mse_upper_cpp, "\n")
```


## 3)

```{r}
# install.packages("statmod")
library(statmod)

gw <- gauss.quad(n = 30, kind = "legendre")
nodes <- gw$nodes
weights <- gw$weights

nodes
weights
```


```{Rcpp}
#include <Rcpp.h>
#include <cmath>
#include <vector>
using namespace Rcpp;

// 30-point Gauss-Legendre nodes and weights
void gauss_legendre_30(std::vector<double>& nodes, std::vector<double>& weights) {
  const double x[] = {
    0.0514718426, 0.1538699136, 0.2546369261, 0.3527047255, 0.4470337695,
    0.5366241481, 0.6205261830, 0.6978504948, 0.7677774321, 0.8295657624,
    0.8825605358, 0.9262000474, 0.9600218650, 0.9836681233, 0.9968934841
  };
  const double w[] = {
    0.1028526529, 0.1017623897, 0.0995934206, 0.0963687372, 0.0921225222,
    0.0868997872, 0.0807558952, 0.0737559747, 0.0659742299, 0.0574931562,
    0.0484026728, 0.0387991926, 0.0287847079, 0.0184664683, 0.0079681925
  };
  nodes.resize(30);
  weights.resize(30);
  for (int i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
    nodes[i]        = -x[14 - i];
    weights[i]      =  w[14 - i];
    nodes[15 + i]   =  x[i];
    weights[15 + i] =  w[i];
  }
}

static std::vector<double> gl_nodes, gl_wts;
static bool gl_init = false;

void ensure_gl() {
  if (!gl_init) {
    gauss_legendre_30(gl_nodes, gl_wts);
    gl_init = true;
  }
}

// Generic GL integration over [a,b] with n_panels
typedef double (*integrand_fn)(double, double, double);

double gl_integrate2(double a, double b, int n_panels,
                     integrand_fn f, double p1, double p2) {
  ensure_gl();
  double h = (b - a) / n_panels;
  double total = 0.0;
  for (int p = 0; p < n_panels; p++) {
    double mid = a + h * (p + 0.5);
    double half_h = h * 0.5;
    for (int i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
      double t = mid + half_h * gl_nodes[i];
      total += half_h * gl_wts[i] * f(t, p1, p2);
    }
  }
  return total;
}

// Direct integrand: t^(s-1)*exp(-t)
double direct_ig(double t, double s, double unused) {
  if (t <= 0.0) return 0.0;
  return std::exp((s - 1.0) * std::log(t) - t);
}

// Transformed for s<1: (1/s)*exp(-u^(1/s))
double transformed_ig(double u, double s, double unused) {
  if (u <= 0.0) return 0.0;
  return (1.0 / s) * std::exp(-std::pow(u, 1.0 / s));
}

// ✅ NEW: stable upper integrand on v ∈ [0, Vmax], with t = x + v
double upper_v_ig(double v, double s, double x) {
  double t = x + v;
  if (t <= 0.0) return 0.0;
  return std::exp((s - 1.0) * std::log(t) - t);
}

// Panels heuristic
int choose_panels(double range) {
  if (range < 1.0) return 20;
  if (range < 10.0) return 40;
  if (range < 100.0) return 80;
  if (range < 1000.0) return 160;
  return 300;
}

// ✅ Scalar helpers so upper can call lower (pure C++)
double lower_scalar(double s, double x) {
  if (x <= 0.0) return 0.0;

  if (s < 1.0) {
    double upper_lim = std::pow(x, s);
    int panels = choose_panels(upper_lim);
    return gl_integrate2(1e-15, upper_lim, panels, transformed_ig, s, 0.0);
  } else {
    int panels = choose_panels(x);
    return gl_integrate2(1e-15, x, panels, direct_ig, s, 0.0);
  }
}

double upper_scalar(double s, double x) {
  if (x <= 0.0) return R::gammafn(s);

  // very large x => ~0
  double cutoff = s + 50.0 * std::sqrt(s) + 200.0;
  if (x > cutoff) return 0.0;

  // ✅ Key fix: for x < s, use complement (avoids missing mass)
  if (x < s + 2.0 * std::sqrt(s)) {
    return R::gammafn(s) - lower_scalar(s, x);
  }

  // ✅ Otherwise compute upper directly, stable v-integral (no 1/u)
  double Vmax = 60.0 + 10.0 * std::sqrt(s);   // baseline
  if (x > 10.0) Vmax = 40.0 + 8.0 * std::sqrt(s);
  if (x > 50.0) Vmax = 25.0 + 5.0 * std::sqrt(s);   // safe truncation
  int panels = choose_panels(Vmax);
  return gl_integrate2(0.0, Vmax, panels, upper_v_ig, s, x);
}

// [[Rcpp::export]]
NumericVector lower_inc_gamma_full_cpp(NumericVector s_vec, NumericVector x_vec) {
  int n = s_vec.size();
  NumericVector out(n);

  for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    double s = s_vec[i];
    double x = x_vec[i];

    if (x <= 0.0) { out[i] = 0.0; continue; }

    // For huge x, lower = gamma(s) - upper (upper tiny)
    if (x > 700.0) {
      out[i] = R::gammafn(s) - upper_scalar(s, x);
    } else {
      out[i] = lower_scalar(s, x);
    }
  }
  return out;
}

// [[Rcpp::export]]
NumericVector upper_inc_gamma_full_cpp(NumericVector s_vec, NumericVector x_vec) {
  int n = s_vec.size();
  NumericVector out(n);

  for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    out[i] = upper_scalar((double)s_vec[i], (double)x_vec[i]);
  }
  return out;
}
```



```{r}
# Timing
ptm <- proc.time()
lower_results_full <- lower_inc_gamma_full_cpp(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

ptm <- proc.time()
upper_results_full <- upper_inc_gamma_full_cpp(param_set$s, param_set$x)
proc.time() - ptm

# MSE
mse_lower_full <- mean((lower_results_full - baseline_lower)^2)
mse_upper_full <- mean((upper_results_full - baseline_upper)^2)
cat("MSE lower (full C++):", mse_lower_full, "\n")
cat("MSE upper (full C++):", mse_upper_full, "\n")
```
